zh.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh.Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Corbet於1225年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利時，她的父親Thomas de Corbet44歲，母親Isabella de Valletort22歲。她於1242年7月2日與Robert de Stafford在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1269年在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Corbet于1225年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利时，她的父亲Thomas de Corbet44岁，母亲Isabella de Valletort22岁。她于1242年7月2日与Robert de Stafford在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1269年在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Corbet was born in 1225, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Corbet, was 44 and her mother, Isabella de Valletort, was 22. She married Robert de Stafford on 2 July 1242, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1269, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Corbet est née en 1225, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Corbet, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Valletort, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Stafford le 2 juillet 1242, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1269, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Corbet 1225 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Corbet 44 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Valletort 22. Sie hat am 2. Juli 1242 in England, United Kingdom Robert de Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1269 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Corbet è nata il nel 1225 nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Corbet, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Valletort, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Stafford il 2 luglio 1242, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1269, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Corbetが1225年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Corbetは44歳，母Isabella de Valletortは22歳であった。1242年7月2日にイギリスイギリスでRobert de Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1269年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Corbet(이)가 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Corbet(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Valletort(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1242년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Robert de Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1269년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Corbet nasceu em 1225, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Corbet, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Valletort, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Stafford em 2 de julho de 1242, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1269, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Corbet родилась в 1225 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Corbet было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Valletort, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Stafford 2 июля 1242 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1269 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Corbet nació en 1225, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Corbet, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Isabella de Valletort, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert de Stafford el 2 de julio de 1242, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1269, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
